violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler blower fans and ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025
